# Release Checklist

- Run `python -m pytest -q`
- Run `python tools/verify_release_artifacts.py`
- Run `python -m edu_materials demo --output-dir out/demo-smoke`
- Run `python tools/check_license_boundary.py`
- Confirm `README.md` quick start commands still match the current CLI
- Confirm PyPI/TestPyPI trusted publishers are configured as documented in `docs/PYPI_PUBLISHING.md`
- Run `.github/workflows/publish-pypi.yml` with `target=testpypi` after packaging-related changes or before the first public PyPI release
- Build the bundle with `python tools/build_skill_bundle.py`
- Verify `skill-dist/edu-materials.zip` is generated by the release workflow
- Recheck that no secrets, proprietary skills, restricted courseware, or student data are present
- Recheck fixture provenance and redistribution rights
- Tag the release only after the checks above pass on the public repository history, not just the current working tree
